prompt: EDIT the attached source banner with TWO minimal changes and PRESERVE EVERYTHING ELSE EXACTLY. CHANGES: (1) Tone down the brightness and saturation of the swirling magic effects and runic-circle background by about 25 percent so the character pops more — keep the runic circle, keep the purple-and-cyan glow, keep the sparkles, but darker and slightly more navy-leaning at the corners. (2) Remove the small white download icon in the bottom-right corner and replace those pixels with the same dark background that surrounds it. KEEP UNCHANGED: the cartoony purple demon-jester character (cheeky teeth-showing grin, small horns, gold crown, purple-and-gold royal-jester collar with central gem), the jester staff with its mini-jester-head topper held in the left hand, the fan of 4 playing cards in the right hand, the runic-circle backdrop composition, the JOKR display lettering at the bottom, the overall purple-and-gold palette, the wide horizontal banner aspect ratio. Output the same image with only those two edits applied.
